title: Cruz's Optimized Modpack
description: Well-researched optimization modpack with an emphasis on pure game performance.
body:
Cruz's Optimization Modpack attempts to offer a foundation of the greatest optimization mods out there, set up to get the best possible performance. It frequently beats other optimization solutions in benchmarks thanks to countless hours of research.

The Modpack is designed with simplicity and maintainability in mind. As a result, the pack contains very few by default quality-of-life or visual improvements mods.

This modpack also comes with the nessesary dependencies for each mod and also has shaders support with the well-known mod [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris).

I will be updating the modpack time-to-time whenever i see theres a significant improvement in the updates of each mod.

<details>
<summary>Mods Included (16)</summary>




- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by [caffeinemc team](https://github.com/CaffeineMC/sodium-fabric) (Very popular - rendering engine rewrite utilizing modern OpenGL features)
- [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) by [Steveplays](https://modrinth.com/user/Steveplays) (Low-impact worldgen optimizations)
- [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak) by [getchoo](https://modrinth.com/user/getchoo) (Allows adjusting thread priorities for the game's different tasks, and when used properly, can give a nice small performance boost. Maintained version of Smooth Boot)
- [MoreCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) by [fxmorin](https://modrinth.com/user/fxmorin) (Culls more block faces and other things for a performance boost.)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) by [embeddedt](https://modrinth.com/user/embeddedt) (A miscellaneous optimization mod targeting load times and memory usage)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) by [caffeinemc team](https://github.com/CaffeineMC/lithium-fabric) (Well-known - general server-side optimizations)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) by [comp500](https://modrinth.com/user/comp500) (Needed for EBE's block entity models to look correctly when used with Sodium)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) by [RaphiMC](https://modrinth.com/user/RaphiMC) (Immediate-mode rendering optimizations concerning many areas of the game)
- [Ferrite-Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) by [malte0811](https://modrinth.com/user/malte0811) (Memory usage optimizations)
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw) (Uses path tracing to cull entities behind walls)
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) by [FoundationGames](https://modrinth.com/user/FoundationGames) (Reimplements block (tile) entities for performance)
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) by [thosea](https://modrinth.com/user/thosea) (Low-impact miscellaneous optimizations)
- [MemoryLeakFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) by [FX](https://modrinth.com/user/FX) (A mod that fixes random memory leaks)
- [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) by [spottedleaf](https://modrinth.com/user/spottedleaf) (Rewrites the light engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors)
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) by [isXander](https://github.com/isXander) (Fixes Minecraft bugs found on the bug tracker)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by [coderbot](https://modrinth.com/user/coderbot) (Well-known, Shaders support to fabric)
